reason: Verified agent chat functionality - agent successfully received message and responded with correct answer to math question.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents.
Clicked agent "QA-20260424-213052-jmzx" in sidebar — Agent page opened with agent home displayed.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status showed "idle" at top right of page.
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message typed and sent button clicked, agent began processing.
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent responded with answer "4" in approximately 2 seconds.
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displayed "4" with "Worked for 2s" indicator showing successful processing.
